triples.subject: Gasoline vehicles
triples.object: 16–25% of the energy from gasoline into movement
triples.sentence: Gasoline vehicles only convert about 16–25% of the energy from gasoline into movement (averaging highway and city driving).

triples.subject: Electric vehicle battery replacements
triples.sentence: A recent study of about 15,000 vehicles from the earliest models through model year 2023 showed that electric vehicle battery replacements due to failure have been rare, at an average of 2.5%, outside of major recalls.

triples.subject: EVs made from 2016 onward
triples.sentence: since model year 2016 they have had less than a 0.5% failure rate.

triples.subject: 97.5% of EVs
triples.sentence: this study found that 97.5% of EVs are still using their original batteries (outside major recalls)

triples.subject: Department of Energy’s (DOE) Build a Better Grid Initiative
triples.object: $13 billion towards improving the reliability and efficiency of the grid
triples.sentence: The Department of Energy’s (DOE) Build a Better Grid Initiative, launched as part of the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, will provide over $13 billion towards improving the reliability and efficiency of the grid over the next decade.

triples.subject: Most EVs
triples.sentence: Most EVs can be charged with a standard 120 Volt (Level 1) outlet.
